summary: Admin UI Restructuring (Phase 5) testing complete. All 17 backend tests pass. Frontend verified with 8 admin tabs, user room/tab assignment, navigation filtering, and dashboard filtering.
passed_tests: Backend: Admin login returns assigned_rooms and visible_tabs
Backend: Child user login returns assigned_rooms and visible_tabs
Backend: GET /api/auth/me returns assigned_rooms and visible_tabs for admin
Backend: GET /api/auth/me returns assigned_rooms and visible_tabs for child
Backend: GET /api/admin/users returns users with assigned_rooms and visible_tabs
Backend: POST /api/admin/users with assigned_rooms and visible_tabs
Backend: PUT /api/admin/users/{id} supports assigned_rooms and visible_tabs
Backend: GET /api/smarthome/rooms returns rooms with device counts
Backend: GET /api/smarthome/devices returns devices
Backend: GET /api/smarthome/dashboard - admin sees all rooms
Backend: GET /api/smarthome/dashboard - child sees filtered rooms by assigned_rooms
Backend: GET /api/audit-log returns audit log entries
Backend: GET /api/services returns services list
Backend: GET /api/admin/settings returns settings
Backend: GET /api/ha/status returns HA connection status
Backend: GET /api/smarthome/profiles returns profiles
Backend: GET /api/smarthome/permissions/{user_id} returns permissions
Frontend: Admin page has 8 tabs (BENUTZER, RÄUME, GERÄTE, FREIGABEN, PROFILE, AUDIT-LOG, DIENSTE, EINSTELLUNGEN)
Frontend: SH-ADMIN removed from sidebar navigation
Frontend: ADMIN button visible for admin/superadmin users
Frontend: User edit form shows room assignment buttons (ZUGEWIESENE RÄUME)
Frontend: User edit form shows tab visibility buttons (SICHTBARE MENÜ-TABS)
Frontend: User list shows assigned rooms as badges (e.g., KINDERZIMMER)
Frontend: Räume tab shows room cards with device count and assigned users
Frontend: EINSTELLUNGEN tab shows KI-Config, Wetter, Home Assistant sections
Frontend: DIENSTE tab shows 4 configured services
Frontend: AUDIT-LOG tab loads and shows activity log
Frontend: Navigation filtering - child user only sees tabs from visible_tabs
Frontend: Child user does NOT see ADMIN, AUTO, HEALTH, LOGS in sidebar
seed_data_creation: Updated Luzia's visible_tabs to restricted set for testing navigation filtering
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin UI Restructuring (Phase 5) fully tested. All 8 admin tabs work: BENUTZER, RÄUME, GERÄTE, FREIGABEN, PROFILE, AUDIT-LOG, DIENSTE, EINSTELLUNGEN. User form has room assignment and tab visibility buttons. Navigation filtering works - child users only see tabs from their visible_tabs. SmartHome dashboard filters rooms by assigned_rooms. No HA devices synced (HA not connected - expected). 3 rooms exist: Luzia, Wohnzimmer, Kinderzimmer. 2 users: Andreas Trenter (superadmin), Luzia (kind, assigned to Kinderzimmer).

mocked_apis_list: Home Assistant REST API (HA not installed - expected)
mocked_apis.note: HA sync/control endpoints fail gracefully. Device filtering would work if HA was connected.
